mapper.sql: select q.id, q.course_id, q.class_id, q.quota, q.selected, q.del_flag, q.create_time, c.class_name from cou_class_quota q left join sys_class c on q.class_id = c.id
mapper.select: where q.course_id = #{courseId} and q.del_flag = '0' order by q.id asc
where q.course_id = #{courseId} and q.class_id = #{classId} and q.del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into cou_class_quota(course_id, class_id, quota, selected, create_time) values (#{courseId}, #{classId}, #{quota}, coalesce(#{selected}, 0), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

insert into cou_class_quota(course_id, class_id, quota, selected, create_time) values
(#{item.courseId}, #{item.classId}, #{item.quota}, coalesce(#{item.selected}, 0), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: update cou_class_quota set del_flag = '2' where course_id = #{courseId}
update cou_class_quota set selected = selected + 1 where course_id = #{courseId} and class_id = #{classId} and del_flag = '0'
update cou_class_quota set selected = selected + 1 where course_id = #{courseId} and class_id = #{classId} and del_flag = '0' and selected < quota
update cou_class_quota set selected = selected - 1 where course_id = #{courseId} and class_id = #{classId} and del_flag = '0' and selected > 0
update cou_class_quota q set selected = 0 from cou_course c where q.course_id = c.id and c.semester_id = #{semesterId} and c.del_flag = '0' and q.del_flag = '0'
